                      intro y hy
                      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hy
                      obtain ⟨D', hD', hD''⟩ := hy
                      have h₉ : y ∈ D' := hD''
                      have h₁₀ : D' ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) := hD'
                      have h₁₁ : D = D' := by
                        have h₁₂ : ∀ a ∈ S, ∃! D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), a = sSup D := R.carrier_span
                        aesop
                      rw [h₁₁]
                      <;> simp_all
                  calc
                    x ≤ sSup D := h₇
                    _ ≤ sSup (⋃ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), D) := h₈
                exact h₅
              · -- Prove that every element of S is in the union
                intro x hx
                have h₄ : ∀ a ∈ S, ∃! D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), a = sSup D := R.carrier_span x hx
                obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := h₄
                have h₅ : x = sSup D := by
                  aesop
                have h₆ : D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) := hD
                have h₇ : x ∈ ⋃ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), D := by
                  have h₈ : x = sSup D := h₅
                  have h₉ : sSup D ∈ D := by
                    -- Prove that the supremum of D is in D
                    have h₁₀ : sSupIndep D := R.carrier_indep D h₆
                    have h₁₁ : sSup D ∈ D := by
                      -- Use the fact that D is independent and the supremum is in D
                      have h₁₂ : sSupIndep D := R.carrier_indep D h₆
                      have h₁₃ : sSup D ∈ D := by
                        -- Prove that the supremum is in D
                        have h₁₄ : ∀ D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)), sSupIndep D := R.carrier_indep
                        have h₁₅ : sSup D ∈ D := by
                          -- Use the fact that D is independent and the supremum is in D
                          have h₁₆ : sSupIndep D := R.carrier_indep D h₆
                          have h₁₇ : sSup D ∈ D := by
                            -- Prove that the supremum is in D
                            simp_all [sSupIndep]
                            <;>
                            (try aesop) <;>
                            (try simp_all [Set.Nonempty]) <;>
                            (try aesop)
                          exact h₁₇
                        exact h₁₅
                      exact h₁₃
                    exact h₁₁
                  have h₁₀ : x ∈ D := by
                    rw [h₈]
                    exact h₉
                  have h₁₁ : D ∈ (R : Set (Set α)) := h₆
                  simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
                  exact ⟨D, h₁₁, h₁₀⟩
                exact h₇
            exact h₃
    rw [h₂]
  exact h₁
